spec.name: Another Corner
spec.description: Another corner of the passage, and just as untidy as the rest of this place (maybe more so?). There is a door to the east though... wonder where that leads? Oh, and the hallway continues west and north.

north.description: More of the hallway there... how exciting!

east.description: You peer into a cluttered little room to the east.

west.description: More of the hallway there... how exciting!
